title: case evaluted to early
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_case (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 2), status BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_case (id, value, status) VALUES (1, -10.00, TRUE), (2, 0.00, FALSE);
SELECT CASE WHEN status THEN value ELSE NULL END FROM test_case WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT CASE WHEN status THEN value ELSE NULL END FROM test_case WHERE id = 2), -1) AS result;
SELECT CASE WHEN value < 0 THEN 'Negative' WHEN value = 0 THEN 'Zero' ELSE 'Positive' END AS value_status FROM test_case;
key_bug_features: CASE statement evaluation with division by zero
